title: SOP 40.2: Working with Microisolator Cages using Aseptic Techniques
display_label: IACUC SOP 40.2 — Working with Microisolator Cages using Aseptic Techniques
content: IACUC SOP for working with microisolator cages while maintaining aseptic technique — protects the specific-pathogen-free (SPF) status of housed colonies.
